## Task

Describe the small QA/QC improvement.

## Evidence Value

Explain how this improves inspection, FAT/SAT readiness, supplier review, commissioning, or handover traceability.

## Suggested File

```text
templates/
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The change is project-neutral.
- [ ] Required evidence is specific and inspectable.
- [ ] Markdown tables render cleanly.
- [ ] No confidential project information is included.
